creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
The makewhatis(1) manual page has a HISTORY section.
It mentions everything except FreeBSD (2BSD, NetBSD, OpenBSD). 

The history of FreeBSD 2.1 to FreeBSD 10 is missing. Same for AUTHORS

See the old makewhatis(1) manpage in FreeBSD 10:

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=makewhatis&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+10.4-RELEASE&arch=default&format=html
